'''zanuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zealousy|zealousy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-n-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zealousy|zealousy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zanuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zænichith|zænichith]] || [[word:zænichij|zænichij]] || [[word:zænichish|zænichish]] || [[word:zænichi|zænichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zanunuchuth|zanunuchuth]] || [[word:zanunuchuj|zanunuchuj]] || [[word:zanunuchush|zanunuchush]] || [[word:zanunuchu|zanunuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zanuchuth|zanuchuth]] || [[word:zanuchuj|zanuchuj]] || [[word:zanuchush|zanuchush]] || [[word:zanuchu|zanuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zanufchufth|zanufchufth]] || [[word:zanufchufj|zanufchufj]] || [[word:zanufchufsh|zanufchufsh]] || [[word:zanufchuf|zanufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zanuchuthu|zanuchuthu]] || [[word:zanuchuju|zanuchuju]] || [[word:zanuchushu|zanuchushu]] || [[word:zanuchuku|zanuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zanuchuth|zanuchuth]] || [[word:zanuchuj|zanuchuj]] || [[word:zanuchush|zanuchush]] || [[word:zanuchu|zanuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zanuchuthul|zanuchuthul]] || [[word:zanuchujul|zanuchujul]] || [[word:zanuchushul|zanuchushul]] || [[word:zanuchukul|zanuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zanuchuuthuthu|zanuchuuthuthu]] || [[word:zanuchuujuju|zanuchuujuju]] || [[word:zanuchuushushu|zanuchuushushu]] || [[word:zanuchuuku|zanuchuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zanuchuthun|zanuchuthun]] || [[word:zanuchujun|zanuchujun]] || [[word:zanuchushun|zanuchushun]] || [[word:zanuchukun|zanuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zanuchuthuoro|zanuchuthuoro]] || [[word:zanuchujuoro|zanuchujuoro]] || [[word:zanuchushuoro|zanuchushuoro]] || [[word:zanuchukuoro|zanuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|ebaeb35}}
